name: Snow Depth and Density Measurements at DML21/22 Refl01LG, Antarctica, December 2021
description: Dataset containing a single observation of snow depth, snow depth top and bottom, and snow density recorded at a specific location in Antarctica. The data includes precise geographic coordinates (Latitude, Longitude), a unique event identifier (DML21/22_Refl01LG), and a timestamp from December 10, 2021. The measurements were taken at a depth interval between 0.0 and 0.05 meters with a recorded snow density of 300 kg/m³.
